label: Infection pathway
description: Defines a named mechanism by which an infection can spread. Referenced by HediffDef.possiblePathways, HediffDef.givesInfectionPathways, and PawnKindDef attack infection pathway lists.

expiryDays.label: Expiry days
expiryDays.description: How many in-game days before this infection pathway entry expires. Converted to ticks at runtime; the ExpiryTicks property is not serialized.

pawnRequired.label: Pawn required
pawnRequired.description: If true, this infection pathway requires a pawn to be the infection source. If false, the pathway can activate without a pawn (e.g. pre-arrival or environmental spread).

new-infection-pathway.label: New infection pathway
new-infection-pathway.description: Minimal InfectionPathwayDef with a def name and label.
